MOUNT KENYA PARTICLE SIZES PART A

REFERENCES:

Thompson, L.G. (1979) Ice core studies from Mt.Kenya, Africa and their relationship to other tropical ice cores studies.  In: Sea
Level, Ice and Climatic Change.  IAHS Publication no. 131, p. 55-62.

DATA DESCRIPTION:
